I refreshed and updated adguard to be sure, then reloaded and for the first time since I first subscribed to adguard, they didnt go away. I have just about everything turned on that I possibly could, and only 1 extension thats not adguard. I try my best to steer clear of risky sites beyond my show watching, and keep all programs and drivers up to date. I've never had this happened before so im really not sure what to do. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.homedepot.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.homedepot.com%2F)

### Comment
> The DNS server itself is unreachable despite fully functional Internet access. My phone had worked seamlessly with the DNS always enabled for months, and just five minutes ago it became completely inaccessible, enabling adguard now essentially disables internet access.
> Pinging dns.adguard-dns.com from windows cmd doesn't result in packet loss however.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: www.mopo.de

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.homedepot.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.homedepot.com%2F)

### Comment
> The DNS server itself is unreachable despite fully functional Internet access. My phone had worked seamlessly with the DNS always enabled for months, and just five minutes ago it became completely inaccessible, enabling adguard now essentially disables internet access.
> Pinging dns.adguard-dns.com from windows cmd doesn't result in packet loss however.

### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://az1.zona.pub/?ref=share](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Faz1.zona.pub%2F%3Fref%3Dshare) ### Comment > Здравствуйте, после 1 запуска Zona любой фильм или сериал источник спокойно включается, но стоит выйти из него и ещё включить его или любой другой ИСТОЧНИК появляется предупреждение чтоб выключил блокировки рекламы. Приходится принудительно через настройки закрывать Zona и ещё раз открывать и также тоже самое 1 запуск нормально, потом всё также. На компьютере с Zona и adguard таких проблем вообще нет. Менял DNS, он также баннер показывает чтоб выключил блокировки рекламы, либо вообще ничего не открывает. Исправьте ситуацию 🙏 (на скриншотах как смог всё изложил по полочкам). ### Screenshots

issue.title: navigator.gmx.net

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://navigator.gmx.net/mail?sid=20f46bbb4d2f7764c813801ed335f9739983b542b27e941b778bdf15713573c522c8ea1b2223f5295607fea0e32c626f](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fnavigator.gmx.net%2Fmail%3Fsid%3D20f46bbb4d2f7764c813801ed335f9739983b542b27e941b778bdf15713573c522c8ea1b2223f5295607fea0e32c626f) ### Comment > gmx mail redirect auf seite bei der ich aufgefordert werde adblocker zu deaktivieren. gmx lässt keine adblocker auf ihrer mail seite zu und es ist nicht möglich adguard dort zu verwenden. ich bekomme schon so einen haufen werbung ins postfach weil gmx gefühlt garnichts filtert, ganz im gegensatz zu google mail. jetzt muss ich mir noch zahnersatz und klimaanlagen anzeigen gefallen lassen. nervt. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/fch1g2ivn8oooscw0444ss8ookgkks0l8yv7j75lkg.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1tttkumbsby8sg8sogk8owowogc0go47lpduw19jjk.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.76 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard German filter Filters last update: | 2026-06-23T08:01:05Z Other extensions used: | `pihole (website ist auf whitelist)` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.76&system_version=Windows+11&ext.manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&regular_filters=2%2C3%2C4%2C6&filters_last_update=2026-06-23T08%3A01%3A05Z&stealth.enabled=0)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.mail.ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mail.ru%2F) ### Comment > AdGuard DNS protection and HTTPS filtering is DAMN slow on M4 max / 128 Gb Ram. > > That's All I want to say. I have to uninstall AdGuard and loose my money for its subscription because it makes web surfing INSANE. Every web page takes from 20 to 30 seconds to be opened. It's insane. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/29lwo6sak4w04kkss4okg4o80s8sgcw13abb3khfdg.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/li0s48up9zkcw0kswogwccs8s4swkggjzrrv7akujk.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Mac v2.18.0.2089 release System version: | `macOS Tahoe 26.3.1 (a) (25D771280a)` Browser: | Safari Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter Tracking protection: | enabled DNS filtering: | server: `System`, `DNS` Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.info/settings/import.html?product_type=mac&product_version=2.18.0.2089+release&system_version=macOS+Tahoe+26.3.1+%28a%29+%2825D771280a%29&browser=safari&filters=2&dns.servers=System%2CDNS&dns.filters_enabled=false&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=false&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true)
